titleStmt.title: SII 39.55: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 55. (A.R. No. 55 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, LEFT OF ENTRANCE MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SRIVALLA[BHA*]DĒVA-26TH YEAR.

summary.p: Damaged. Records the gift of paṭṭaṇappakuti on the merchandise edible items like uppu (salt), Mañjal (Turmeric), Venkāyam (onion) by the trading communities Nagarattār and Padinen Visaiyattār to the temple. In return for this service, the temple honoured them with Tirunīr to the nagarattar of Sundara-Chōlapuram, alias Dēsiyugantam of Ulavāuyir Kūṟṟam in Tēr-nāḍu. Ālasundira bhaṭṭar Sundarapaṇḍya Brahmādirāyar etc., are mentioned as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī civallapa te
varkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6vatu kumpa nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tiṅkkiḻa
maiyum dvādaśiyum peṟṟa matta cākara maṇ
ṭalattuc camaiviṉoṭuṅ
naṭātti nikaḻāniṉṟa l nakaramum pati
ṉeṇ viṣayamu
ṭutta paricāvatu Eṟu
paḷḷa Irācipoti
vatta potikku
veṟkomap potiku øorumā
2mā Uppu potikku øorumā Āka vanta ku mañcaḷ niril cukku (1/2)
vayiṟṟukku mārappukku Oṉṟukku Āka vanta ø mum mañcaḷ kku
ṇkāyam Uppu mārappukku ø Araimāvāka vanta
ppaṭi pālaiyaṉ paḷḷi Irāciyāka peṟṟaruḷuvarākap paṭṭaṇa pakuti
kaṭṭik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyaṉāyanāṟku Oli
sūpamastu Olavāyūr kūṟṟattut ternāṭṭu cuntaracoḻapuramāṉa teciyukantaṇattu
cuntaracoḻapurattu nakarattāṟku munṉāḷ ṇ ṭāṉ ṭukkum tīttamum tirunīṟum In
peṟṟu cantiravatitavaṟ cella naṭantu pokaṭavatākavum
Ālāla cuntirapaṭṭar Eḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭi piramātarāyar Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.55 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
